Package org.eventb.core.tests

Class MarkerMatcher

java.lang.Object
org.hamcrest.BaseMatcher<org.eclipse.core.resources.IMarker>
org.eventb.core.tests.MarkerMatcher
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.hamcrest.Matcher<org.eclipse.core.resources.IMarker>, org.hamcrest.SelfDescribing
public class MarkerMatcher extends org.hamcrest.BaseMatcher<org.eclipse.core.resources.IMarker>
Describes an expected Rodin marker in the database.

    • MarkerMatcher

      private MarkerMatcher(IRodinElement element, IAttributeType attrType, int charStart, int charEnd, IRodinProblem problem, String[] args)

  • Method Details

    • marker

      public static MarkerMatcher marker(IRodinElement element, IRodinProblem problem, String... args)
      Returns a matcher for a marker on the given element with the given problem and arguments. The matched marker must not have an attribute set.

    • marker

      public static MarkerMatcher marker(IInternalElement element, IAttributeType attrType, IRodinProblem problem, String... args)
      Returns a matcher for a marker on the given attribute with the given problem and arguments. The matched marker must not have any substring position set.

    • marker

      public static MarkerMatcher marker(IInternalElement element, IAttributeType attrType, int charStart, int charEnd, IRodinProblem problem, String... args)
      Returns a matcher for a marker on the given attribute substring with the given problem and arguments.
